name: example-clone-raycast
title: Clone Raycast
description: Clone Raycast's site — dark product landing, glow accents, screenshots.

description_i18n.en: Clone Raycast's site — dark product landing, glow accents, screenshots.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 复刻 Raycast 官网 —— 深色产品落地页、光晕点缀、产品截图。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 復刻 Raycast 官網 —— 深色產品落地頁、光暈點綴、產品截圖。

query.en: Clone this website faithfully: https://raycast.com. Use the web-clone workflow — recon the site, harvest its real fonts and images, match its exact colors and scroll feel, then build a local clone. Keep the original assets; record trademarks/copyright in NOTES.md for me to replace.
query.zh-CN: 忠实复刻这个网站：https://raycast.com。走 web-clone 流程 —— 侦察站点、抓取真实字体与图片、照抄精确色值与滚动体感，再构建本地复刻。保留原始素材；把商标/版权项记进 NOTES.md 交我替换。
